title: WA Robot Search Index Stats Response
description: Schema for the data field when calling 'wa robot search-index stats'. Returns a health and freshness snapshot for the on-disk search index.

index_dir.description: Filesystem path to the Tantivy index directory

state_path.description: Filesystem path to the index state file

document_count.description: Number of searchable documents currently stored

segment_count.description: Number of index segments currently present

index_size_bytes.description: Approximate on-disk index size in bytes

pending_docs.description: Documents queued for the next flush

max_index_size_bytes.description: Configured index size cap before eviction/cleanup

ttl_days.description: Retention window applied to indexed content

flush_docs_threshold.description: Queued-document threshold that triggers a flush

freshness_age_ms.description: Age of the newest indexed capture relative to now (ms)

last_update_ts.description: Timestamp of the last successful index update (epoch ms)

source_counts.description: Indexed document counts grouped by source type

embedder_tiers_available.description: Embedding tiers currently available for semantic indexing

indexing_error_count.description: Count of recent indexing errors tracked in state

last_error.description: Most recent indexing error message, if recorded
